message:
fix(fusion,fsfs): harden deserialization and input validation

conformal.rs: Add custom Deserialize impl that rejects empty
nonconformity_scores, zero ranks, unsorted scores, and mismatched
n_calibration counts. Three new validation tests.

prf.rs: Guard against NaN/Infinity in alpha parameter by defaulting
to 0.8 when non-finite values are detected. Two new tests.

queue.rs: Add defensive guard in requeue() to detect stale
pending_ids index and avoid silent duplicate ingestion when
bookkeeping drifts. One new test.

runtime.rs: Refactor resolve_paths() to properly allow absolute paths
while still rejecting parent-directory traversal via .. components.
Improve error messages distinguishing symlink vs absolute-path escape
vectors. One new test for absolute paths with .. components.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
